arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle centre-back linked with move, club official confirms talks
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly is being linked with a move away from St James’ Park despite transferring to the northeast only in the summer. Kelly arrived from Bournemouth in June last year on a free transfer after failing to agree on a new deal at the Vitality Stadium. arts.sum: Fenerbahce vice-president Acun Ilıcalı has told the Turkish media that they are interested in signing Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly during this transfer window. Today there were reports the Super Lig giants want to sign Kelly as Jose Mourinho looks to bring in a left sided defender. arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth pal's 'bizarre' claim after Newcastle United denied £135m Aston Villa proposal
arts.sum: Premier League executives 'celebrating' losing £105m over three years is a 'bizarre notion'. "For too long we have patted ourselves on the back for only losing £105m every three years," he told Sky Sports ahead of the Premier League confirming no clubs had been charged for breaching the rules last season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United said to be asking for $15m to sell player this month
arts.sum: Newcastle United are asking for $15m to sell Miguel Almirón this month, with River Plate still interested in him. That’s according to Soy del Millo, who report that the Argentine side have already been in touch about a move this month. arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sends Newcastle PSR warning after being forced to offload star in 'the last sale we wanted to make' - as the Magpies boss looks to hold onto more academy players
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: The Magpies boss insists the club had no choice but to sell the star last June. Without it, he says, they would have faced a Premier League points deduction.
